0_Overview: What is Go: Statically Typed, Compiled Language by Google
Benefits: Extremely Fast Compilation
Benefits: Built-in Concurrency with Goroutines and Channels
Benefits: Simple, Minimal Syntax — Easy to Learn
Benefits: Single Binary Deployment — No Runtime Dependencies
Benefits: Excellent Standard Library
Benefits: Built-in Tooling: go fmt, go test, go vet, go doc
Benefits: Low Memory Footprint — Great for Microservices
Drawbacks: No Generics Until 1.18 (still maturing)
Drawbacks: Verbose Error Handling (if err != nil everywhere)
Drawbacks: No Exceptions — Error Handling is Manual
Drawbacks: Smaller Ecosystem than Node.js or Python
Drawbacks: No Inheritance — Composition Only
Drawbacks: GC Pauses (though very short)
When to Use: High-performance APIs and Microservices
When to Use: CLI Tools and DevOps Tooling (Docker, Kubernetes are written in Go)
When to Use: Network Servers, Proxies, Load Balancers
When to Use: Systems Programming where you need speed but not C complexity
When NOT to Use: Rapid prototyping, Data Science, ML, Mobile
Go vs Node.js: Performance and Use Cases
Go vs Rust: Safety vs Simplicity Trade-off
Go vs Java: Startup Time, Memory, Simplicity
Famous Go Projects: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Prometheus, Hugo
1_Go_Basics: Go Program Structure: package main, import, func main()
Go Workspace: GOPATH, Go Modules (go.mod, go.sum)
Basic Types: int, int8/16/32/64, uint, float32/64, complex, string, bool, byte, rune
Type Conversion: Explicit Only, No Implicit Coercion
Strings: Immutable, UTF-8, len(), rune iteration
String Builder: strings.Builder for Efficient Concatenation
fmt Package: Printf, Sprintf, Fprintf, Errorf
Control Flow: if-else (no parentheses), for (only loop), switch
Range: for i, v := range slice
defer: Deferred Function Calls, LIFO Order
2_Data_Structures: Map Operations: Read, Write, Delete, Check Existence
3_Functions_and_Interfaces: errors.Is() and errors.As() for Error Wrapping
4_Concurrency: Channels: make(chan T), Buffered vs Unbuffered
Closing Channels: close(), Range over Channel
Context Package: WithCancel, WithTimeout, WithDeadline, WithValue
5_Standard_Library: strings: Contains, Split, Join, Replace, TrimSpace, Builder
time: Time, Duration, Ticker, Timer, time.Now()
os: File Operations, Environment Variables, Args
io and io/fs: Reader, Writer, Seeker, Closer
path/filepath: Join, Dir, Base, Ext, Glob
testing: T, B, F (fuzz), Subtests, Benchmarks
6_Go_Web_Development: Gin Framework: Routing, Middleware, Binding, Validation
Chi Middleware: Logger, Recoverer, RealIP, Compress
Request Binding: JSON, Form, Query Params
REST API Best Practices in Go
Graceful Shutdown with context and os.Signal
7_Go_Database_and_Testing: sqlc: Generate Type-safe Code from SQL
8_Go_Tooling_and_Deployment: go build, go run, go install
go mod: init, tidy, vendor, download
